title: Rein Halbersma
text: Home * People * Rein Halbersma Rein Halbersma , a Dutch Draughts and Checkers programmer, and author of the Draughts and Checkers Template Library DCTL [1] . He is further interested in computer chess and chess programming, and active poster in Computer Chess Forums .
